titles.title: He Didn't Throw the Clay Away (2)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Empty and broken, I came back to Him A vessel unworthy, so scarred from sin. But He did not despair, He started over again And I bless the day He didn't throw the clay away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Over and over, He molds me and makes me, Into His likeness, He fashions the clay. A vessel of honor, I am today, All because Jesus didn't throw the clay away.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is the Potter, and I am the clay Molded in His image, He wants me to stay. But when I stumble, When I fall, and my vessel breaks, He just picks up the all pieces, He never throw the clay away.
